title: No mob loot
description: Adds an enchantment that makes mobs drop no loot
body:
A mod originally made for my survival world because I got tired of junk dropped by mobs taking up my inventory space, so if you have the same problem give it a try

This mod adds an enchantment(specifically a curse) that when put on a weapon(sword or axe) makes the dropped loot instantly despawn, be careful tho since every item also on the same block as where the mob dies also gets despawned

Made using Mcreator
